steps.title: Identify the contrast goal
steps.content: To contrast the two NWRs is to highlight their differences. The notes reveal a key contrast: one refuge is on the Atlantic coast in Virginia; the other is on the Pacific coast in California.

steps.title: Find the contrast language
steps.content: Choice A uses While to juxtapose the refuges' geographic locations—Virginia on the Atlantic coast versus California on the Pacific coast—establishing a clear, parallel contrast. The other choices don't contrast the two refuges. That matches choice A — A is correct.
